prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-HAWKBILLKNIFE-PARENT Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Hawkbill Style Folding Knife Digital Camo Pocket Blade (4 Colors) Description: Be prepared out in the field with the ASR Outdoor Hawkbill Style Kerambit Pocket Knife.

This blade features a point that will tear even if the rest of the knife becomes dull. The pocket knife has an overall length of 6.5" and the blade itself is about 2.5" in length. The body of the knife features a digital camo design and comes with a pocket clip so you can easily attach it to your pocket, belt or bag.

The handle of the knife features a finger loop for convenience, and the kerambit style of this pocket knife makes it an ideal option for personal protection. The blade is constructed of durable stainless steel, and is designed for everyday uses including cutting, slashing, hooking and trapping. Make sure to keep one of these on you, in your car or in your camping and emergency gear.

Colors Available: Navy Blue, Desert, Green or Grey Search Terms: pocket knife small folding for women spring assisted pink Features: - Hawkbill Style Kerambit Pocket Knife - 4 Colors - Overall Length: 6.5 inches; Blade Length: 2.5 incehes; Folded Length: 4.75 inches - Hawkbill Style Blade Point Will Tear Even If Blade is Dull - Material: Stainless Steel - Comes with Pocket Clip & Finger Loop === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Hawkbill Folding Knife 4-Color Pocket Blade
